title: Mama and Papa read the note together
prompt: Mid-close-up at the @beach-blanket. @Mama already standing on the LEFT holding the glowing @magic-bottle in her hand, head tilted toward Papa to read along. @Papa already standing on the RIGHT, the unrolled @rescue-note held out between them, both adults reading silently. They share a look of bewildered concern. Sara and Eva are OFF-CAMERA (their voices project softly from off-frame). Papa (folding the note carefully, looking at Mama): "Honey... a magic-forest fox stuck on an ISLAND. We promised them an adventure." Mama (looking at the bottle in her hand, then up at Papa, smiling small): "Then we need a plan. And a BOAT." Papa nods, jaw set, already thinking.
